component.name: Lapcare
component.summary: Battery health, firmware updates and diagnostics for ThinkPads

description.p: Lapcare gives ThinkPad owners the system insight they lost when they left Lenovo Vantage behind: hardware information, battery health and wear analysis, firmware updates via fwupd/LVFS, storage health, one-click diagnostics, and exportable diagnostic reports — in one native window.

Lapcare wraps the excellent hardware tooling Linux already has (fwupd, UPower, smartctl, sysfs) behind one coherent, modern interface. Every feature degrades gracefully on missing tools or unsupported hardware.
Milestone M0: project skeleton and development rails. Not a usable release.
